## Deep Audit V2: hx-text-input

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-text-input` component. wc-mcp baseline score: 93/100 (A).

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, screen reader support. Form association via ElementInternals.
